message:
feat(runtime,server): wire client-query-buffer-limit and proto-max-bulk-len

- Add query_buffer_limit (default 1 GiB) and proto_max_bulk_len (default
  512 MiB) to ServerState, matching Redis defaults
- CONFIG SET/GET for both parameters
- fr-server reads runtime values instead of the old 1 MiB hardcoded const
- Old QUERY_BUFFER_LIMIT const removed

Closes: frankenredis-tvv

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
